collectible.name: British Paratrooper Beret
collectible.description:
Authentic World War II British Airborne Forces maroon beret. This iconic "Red Beret" was worn by paratroopers of the British Army during operations including Market Garden and the Rhine crossings.
Features the original cap badge of the Parachute Regiment with the distinctive Bellerophon riding Pegasus design. The interior retains its leather sweatband and manufacturer's label.
